column1: # BL HPRC Seed Target List for Stratified Sampling
#         Candidate (HPRC) target list; supplemented with stellar parameters from
#         and NASA Exoplanet Archive (Akeson et al. 2013).
#   name      — Common name or HD designation where available
#   dist_pc   — Distance in parsecs (from Hipparcos parallax or Gaia DR3)
#   spec_type — MK spectral type (first two characters used for stratum)
#   bl_paper  — BL survey paper first using this target
# Scientific guardrail: This table is a scheduling aid and sampling frame.
# No entry constitutes a detection claim or authorizes external submission.
